ats_utilities.utils.boolean module¶

Module

boolean.py

Info

Defines factory boolean utilities.

ats_utilities.utils.boolean.str_bool_to_bool(val: str, exc_message: str | None = None, exception_class: type[BaseException] = <class 'ats_utilities.exceptions.ats_value_error.ATSValueError'>) → bool[source]¶

Converts a string boolean to a boolean.

Parameters:

val (<str>) – String boolean to convert to a boolean.

Returns:

Boolean value.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:
Dynamically raises the provided exception_class (e.g., ATSValueError).
